scope_summary.problem: SDD merge workflow archives specs but performs no git operations. Config only has issue_platform — no separation for repo/spec/docs concerns. → requirements.md § R1-R5
scope_summary.success_criteria: 1. config.toml has [sdd.repo_platform] and [sdd.spec_platform] sections parsed by SddConfig. 2. After ChangeArchived, dirty paths under cclab/ are staged and committed when auto_commit=true. 3. PR created to default_branch when auto_pr=true, body written by agent. 4. repo_platform.repo is required (no fallback). → pre_clarifications Q1-Q3

out_of_scope: git push (only commit and PR creation)
constraints: Follows existing config upsert pattern (strip_toml_sections + append)
Merge flowchart is DAG (flowchart TD), not FSM
Agent dispatch for PR body follows existing multi_claude_agents pattern
